task_description: Implement Phase 7 (Load Testing & Deployment) of NexusQueue: k6 load test scripts, Dockerfiles for all services, production docker-compose, GitHub Actions CI, and comprehensive documentation (ARCHITECTURE.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, README benchmark section).

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds (all 4 workspaces). npm test passes all 92 tests. Docker build skipped due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. No existing source code modified. Semantic review v2 APPROVED. CI cache fixed (caches ~/.npm instead of node_modules). Dashboard compose context fixed. USER directives added to Dockerfiles.
